sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 36

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 36:1
items.html: (to the question) She receives there the discernment of the Aviut [coarseness] of Behina Aleph, which brings out the level of Yenika [suckling]. And you must remember what was written above in Answer 138: the intent is only to a discernment of a root of correction, from which afterwards, at the time of the Gadlut of ZA [Zeir Anpin], when he comes to impart Mochin of Yenika to the Nukva, he imparts to her from this root of his, of the quality of Tiferet, which he had at the time of his own Yenika. (p. 771, Item 57)
